mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
DELETE FROM sys_article_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.quantity, a.is_stick, a.create_time, c.name AS categoryName, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM sys_article a LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.status = 1
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_article_tag sat WHERE sat.article_id = a.id AND sat.tag_id = #{tagId} )
AND a.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND a.title like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')
order by a.is_stick desc, a.create_time desc

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.content_md, a.content, a.keywords, a.quantity, a.is_stick, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.is_original, a.original_url, c.id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, u.nickname, u.avatar, (SELECT COUNT(sc.id) FROM sys_comment sc WHERE sc.article_id = a.id) AS commentNum, (SELECT COUNT(sal.id) FROM sys_article_like sal WHERE sal.article_id = a.id) AS likeNum, (SELECT COUNT(saf.id) FROM sys_article_favorite saf WHERE saf.article_id = a.id) AS favoriteNum FROM sys_article a LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.id where a.id = #{id}
SELECT CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM create_time) AS INTEGER) AS year FROM sys_article WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY year order by year desc
select id,title,create_time from sys_article where status = 1 and CAST(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM create_time) AS INTEGER) = #{year} order by create_time desc
SELECT TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COUNT(id) AS count FROM sys_article WHERE create_time::date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year' group by date order by date
SELECT COUNT( id ) > 0 AS isLike FROM sys_article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM sys_article_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT COUNT(id) > 0 AS isFavorite FROM sys_article_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId}
SELECT c.name AS name, COUNT( a.id ) AS value FROM sys_article a LEFT JOIN sys_category c ON a.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.quantity, a.is_stick, a.create_time FROM sys_article a left join sys_article_like sal on a.id = sal.article_id WHERE sal.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.quantity, a.is_stick, a.create_time ORDER BY MAX(sal.id) DESC

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover, a.quantity, a.is_stick, saf.create_time FROM sys_article a left join sys_article_favorite saf on a.id = saf.article_id WHERE saf.user_id = #{userId} order by saf.create_time desc
SELECT COUNT(sal.id) FROM sys_article_like sal LEFT JOIN sys_article a ON sal.article_id = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1
SELECT COUNT(sal.id) FROM sys_article_like sal LEFT JOIN sys_article a ON sal.article_id = a.id WHERE sal.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1 AND a.user_id != #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT saf.article_id) FROM sys_article_favorite saf LEFT JOIN sys_article a ON saf.article_id = a.id WHERE saf.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status = 1 AND a.user_id != #{userId}
